SessionStart.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/memory" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/worker-results" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"additionalContext": "Deep Research v2 loaded. Cache: '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/"}'

PreCompact.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[DR] Compaction: research plan and evaluation state are cached at '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/. Use dr-cache restore after compaction."}'
